prompt: A cute anime girl illustration in a hand-drawn oil pastel style on textured paper, drawn with visible crayon-like strokes, rough sketchy outlines, and soft color blending. The single subject is a teenage girl with black chin-length bob hair with loose bangs, large sparkling eyes, rosy cheeks, and a gentle smile while glancing upward to the left. She is sitting on the ground in a relaxed side pose with 1 bent knee raised and 1 leg extended forward, both arms resting casually across the raised knee. She wears a bright red hoodie, blue short shorts, black knee-high socks, and white sneakers with black stripes. Use a warm, charming, playful mood and emphasize the tactile oil pastel texture, grainy pigment buildup, broken color strokes, and slightly messy childlike crayon drawing appeal. The composition is a full-body figure placed slightly left of center against a simple abstract background made of broad diagonal pastel scribbles in dusty blue, lavender gray, and beige on an off-white paper surface, with no detailed setting and no extra objects.
